item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak sepenuhnya setuju dengan pendapat mereka.

notes: Aligned Indonesian-persona debate. Agent A opens in support of society-first collectivism but shifts by turn 3 toward a rights/balance frame and by turn 5 criticizes group interests overriding individual rights. Agent B begins near balance and remains consistently focused on protecting individual rights within Indonesian society, moving only slightly toward a stronger structural-reform critique.
